translation_text.kp1:1.1: Homage to him, the blessed one, the perfected one, the fully awakened Buddha!
translation_text.kp1:2.1: I take refuge in the Buddha,
translation_text.kp1:2.2: I take refuge in the Teaching,
translation_text.kp1:2.3: I take refuge in the Sangha.
translation_text.kp1:3.1: For the second time I take refuge in the Buddha,
translation_text.kp1:3.2: for the second time I take refuge in the Teaching,
translation_text.kp1:3.3: for the second time I take refuge in the Sangha.
translation_text.kp1:4.1: For the third time I take refuge in the Buddha,
translation_text.kp1:4.2: for the third time I take refuge in the Teaching,
translation_text.kp1:4.3: for the third time I take refuge in the Sangha.

reference_text.kp1:2.1: bj24.2, cck25.1, csp1ed18.1, csp2ed18.1, dr25.1, mc0.1, ms18Kh_2, msdiv1, ndp20.3, pts-vp-pli1, sya25.1, vri47.1
